mapper.select: SELECT role FROM group_members WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT gm.group_id, gm.user_id, gm.role, gm.joined_at, u.display_name, u.email FROM group_members gm INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = gm.user_id WHERE gm.group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY gm.joined_at ASC
SELECT gm.group_id, gm.user_id, gm.role, gm.joined_at, u.display_name, u.email FROM group_members gm INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = gm.user_id WHERE gm.group_id = #{groupId} AND gm.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_members (group_id, user_id, role) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{userId}, #{role})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM group_members WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_id = #{userId}
